mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUICK_IDX, MENU_NAME, LINK_URL, LINK_TARGET, ICON_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, VIEW_YN, LINK_USE_YN, PRINT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS ADD_DATE FROM CMS_QUICK_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND VIEW_YN = 'Y'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY PRINT_SEQ ASC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUICK_IDX, MENU_NAME, LINK_URL, LINK_TARGET, ICON_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, VIEW_YN, LINK_USE_YN, PRINT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS ADD_DATE FROM CMS_QUICK_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUICK_IDX = #{quick_idx}
